title: Idhu Enna Lyrics Mundasupatti Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Idhu Enna
Singer(s): Haricharan, Kalyani Nair
Music: Sean Roldan
Movie: Mundasupatti

Idhu enna kannil thaavudhu oru maan ingu
Idamondru nenjil kaayudhu adhu yen indru
sottu sottaai en manadhai sondugiraal.

Yekkangal thaan kolla
thaakkaangal thaan indru, sandhikkuren.
Thookkangal yen illai
nettruvarai endru sindhikkuren.

Neliginren, porigindren
vilugindren, azhugindren
Koththu koththaai en manadhai
konjugiraai.

Paalai nilamenna vaadumaa
paavai enadhu aagumaa.
paadha ninaivugal aarumaa
paadhai iru veedaagumaa.

Neliginren, porigindren
vilugindren, azhugindren
KOnji  konji en manadhai
koththugiraal.

hmm vidhai ondru nenjil veesiyadhoru
maan andru.
Thalir ondru kannil kaanugiren
naan indru.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Idhu Enna?

The song Idhu Enna expresses feelings of love and longing, reflecting the emotional turmoil of the characters in Mundasupatti.

What is the plot context of the song in Mundasupatti?

In Mundasupatti, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic tension between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Idhu Enna?

The song is sung by Haricharan and Kalyani Nair, whose voices beautifully complement each other.

Who composed the music for Idhu Enna?

The music for Idhu Enna was composed by Sean Roldan, known for his unique musical style.

When was Idhu Enna released?

Idhu Enna was released on May 8, 2014, as part of the Mundasupatti soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Idhu Enna from Mundasupatti beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and longing experienced by the characters. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. The collaboration between Haricharan and Kalyani Nair adds depth to the song, making it a memorable piece. This duet not only enhances the narrative of the film but also resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Idhu Enna from Mundasupatti is a beautifully crafted duet that captures the essence of love and longing. With the mesmerizing voices of Haricharan and Kalyani Nair, this song takes you on an emotional journey that resonates deeply. Sean Roldan's enchanting composition adds a unique flavor, making it a must-listen for any Tamil music lover.
stanzaMeanings: What is this? There is a deer in my eyes, and it is burning in my heart. Today, it is telling my heart something.
Today, I am thinking about the things that are troubling me. I wonder why I don't have any support from yesterday.
I am feeling lost, confused, and crying. You are capturing my heart with your playful ways.
Is the empty space a place for me? Will my thoughts become something? Are my memories just a path to nowhere?
What will tomorrow bring? Will it be something that cannot be explained?
I am feeling lost, confused, and crying. You are capturing my heart with your playful ways.
Hmm, there is a seed in my heart that is blowing like a deer. I see a bud in my eyes today.
It has come and is resting in my heart...
